context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 153 fully verified. T1: Settings → Notifications tab has 'Weekly digest preview' section with 'Send preview' button (data-testid=send-digest-preview-btn). Button shows Sending.../Sent!/Send preview states correctly. T2: Contract templates consolidated in /app/kolor-studio-v2/backend/src/data/contractTemplates.ts - exports CONTRACT_TEMPLATES (6 types), INDUSTRY_TO_CONTRACT_TYPE (10 industries), fillContractTemplate function. Both contracts.ts and quotes.ts import from this shared file. T3: Forgot-password rate limit now DB-persisted via User.passwordResetAttempts and User.passwordResetWindowStart fields. 3 requests allowed per hour, 4th returns 429. Counters reset on successful password reset.
